title: PortfolioRiskSnapshot
description: JSON response for POST /api/portfolio/risk-snapshot (format=json). When format=pdf, the response is binary application/pdf.

market.description: Fraction of portfolio variance from market factor

diversification.description: Optional correlation-adjusted diversification metrics. Present only when include_diversification=true on the request.

window_days.description: Rolling window used to estimate ETF correlations (trading days).

naive_pws.description: Position-weighted sum of per-ticker ERs, ignoring cross-position correlations (upper bound on systematic risk).

total.description: Sum of the four layers; naive upper bound for portfolio risk share.

correlation_adjusted.description: Same layers as naive_pws, adjusted for the correlation matrix of the sector/subsector ETFs (actual variance contribution).

diversification_credit.description: Per-layer 'credit' from correlation adjustment: naive_pws[layer] − correlation_adjusted[layer]. Higher = more diversification benefit.

market.description: Diversification credit at the market layer.

sector.description: Diversification credit at the sector layer.

subsector.description: Diversification credit at the subsector layer.

residual.description: Diversification credit at the residual (idiosyncratic) layer.

layers.description: Per-layer detail aligned with the decomposition hierarchy. Useful for ranking which layer is carrying the most (and least-diversified) risk.

layer.description: Which layer of the decomposition this row describes.

naive_er.description: Position-weighted sum of ER at this layer (no correlation adjustment).

adjustment_er.description: naive_er − adjusted_er. Positive means diversification reduced risk at this layer.

multiplier.description: Ratio adjusted_er / naive_er (null if naive_er is 0).

unique_etfs.description: Count of distinct sector/subsector ETFs contributing to this layer for the portfolio.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings about data coverage or assumption violations.

_explanation.description: Plain-English summary suitable for showing to an end user.

per_ticker.description: One row per position, in the order supplied in the request. Null values indicate the metric was unavailable for that ticker on the snapshot date.

weight.description: Supplied portfolio weight (not necessarily normalized to 1).

l3_mkt_er.description: Fraction of this position's variance explained by the market factor (0–1).

l3_sec_er.description: Fraction explained by the sector factor after removing market (0–1).

l3_sub_er.description: Fraction explained by the subsector factor after removing market and sector (0–1).

l3_res_er.description: Fraction of idiosyncratic / stock-specific variance. Cannot be ETF-hedged.

l3_mkt_hr.description: Hedge ratio vs. market factor ETF (SPY by default).

l3_sec_hr.description: Hedge ratio vs. sector ETF after orthogonalizing against market. Negative values are valid.

l3_sub_hr.description: Hedge ratio vs. subsector ETF after orthogonalizing against market and sector. Negative values are valid.

_metadata.description: Response provenance and billing metadata. Also surfaced as response headers (X-Data-As-Of, X-Cost-Usd).

generated_at.description: Server-side timestamp when this snapshot was computed (ISO 8601).

lineage.description: Lineage identifier linking this response to the risk engine version and data cut.

billing_code.description: Internal billing SKU recorded for this request.

data_as_of.description: Trading day the underlying metrics correspond to (YYYY-MM-DD).
